name: Egg Hatcher
summary: Feed me a .egg URL or path — I'll fetch it and hot-load the rapplication into this brainstem. The universal install mechanism for the catalog.
_note: Bootstrap: install once via `brainstem hatch <egg-url>` from the brainstem CLI (kernel-shipped utils.bond). After that, all subsequent egg installs go through this agent via /chat — the LLM picks the egg_hatcher tool when the user asks to install a rapp.
